title: Phonus rhiphaeus
taxonomy: Phonus rhiphaeus is classified as a genus of ground beetles in the family Carabidae. This genus is part of the larger order Coleoptera, which includes all beetles. Within Carabidae, Phonus rhiphaeus is likely to be part of a specific subfamily or tribe, but this information is not readily available. Further research is required to determine the exact classification of Phonus rhiphaeus.
